goals.title: Realtime full-stack template
goals.objective: Ship an orchestrator stack with WebSocket and SSE transport, Redis pub-sub, room-channel abstraction and presence as first-class primitives. This is the substrate without which no realtime app can be generated and it unblocks G02, G04 and G07.
goals.evidence: Shipped apps/orchestrator/templates/nextjs-realtime 42 files. SSE transport stream and publish routes, hub.ts in-process pub-sub plus optional Redis fan-out, room-channel abstraction, presence, membership ACL in policy.ts gating every subscribe and publish against channel_members, persisted messages, rate limit, reconnect plus offline-queue client SDK and useChannel hook, working two-pane chat demo, NextAuth v5 credentials JWT, channel REST create list invite history. Registered as container stack realtime in schemas/project.py and migration 0021. TypeScript reviewed BUILD-CLEAN zero blockers. Commits fc06e3b and 28f1ee0 on main. Integration tail in commit body discovery routing, image build, manual prod migration 0021, web label sync, functional proof deferred to G004.

goals.title: Membership and ACL primitive
goals.objective: Extend the entity engine with a relation-based membership model of conversation members and per-record gates keyed on membership and a role graph, so multi-party data like DMs and class chats cannot leak by default. Depends on the realtime shape from G01.

goals.title: Controlled backend authoring
goals.objective: Replace the never-touch-backend ban with a sandboxed schema-validated authoring surface of declared endpoints plus generated handlers, so the writer model can express real server logic beyond CRUD under guardrails from G05 and G06.

goals.title: Functional E2E acceptance gate
goals.objective: Build a Playwright gate that drives signup, login, full CRUD and the message-arrives-on-second-client check, and wire its verdict into the ship boolean so the system stops being blind to whether features actually work.

goals.title: Security negative-path gate
goals.objective: From the account of user B, attempt to read or modify user A records and cross-conversation messages, and fail the build on any leak. Also assert CORS, CSRF and payload limits, making secure-from-first-prompt enforceable.

goals.title: Harden FastAPI template and validate secrets
goals.objective: Bake CORS, CSRF, max-payload and content-type middleware plus fail-fast auth-secret and database-URL validation into the base template so secure-by-default transport is the floor.

goals.title: Multi-role auth and role verification
goals.objective: Provide a role-graph primitive such as teacher, student and parent, and extend the E2E gate to test signup, role assignment and a denied path. School-CRM correctness is inherently multi-role.

goals.title: Durable week-long builds
goals.objective: Snapshot each feature E2E test and re-run it on every later prompt, and add Alembic and Drizzle migration-safety checks so a week of prompting compounds instead of regressing.

claudeObjective: Complete all ultragoal stories in .omc/ultragoal/goals.json: G001-realtime-full-stack-template Realtime full-stack template; G002-membership-and-acl-primitive Membership and ACL primitive; G003-controlled-backend-authoring Controlled backend authoring; G004-functional-e2e-acceptance-gate Functional E2E acceptance gate; G005-security-negative-path-gate Security negative-path gate; G006-harden-fastapi-template-and-validate Harden FastAPI template and validate secrets; G007-multi-role-auth-and-role-verificatio Multi-role auth and role verification; G008-durable-week-long-builds Durable week-long builds
